content.text:
1. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full tweet text: "just shipped the biggest update for aeon ever i've been using aeon for the past month; at the beginning, it was just a better version of openclaw running in the cloud then one week ago, i've started giving aeon more autonomy. it started to ship a self-healing loop for his skills. then it started to ship a skill that auto-merge repos. then it built a fleet automation system. for the past few days, my aeon has honestly became 3x more useful & efficient - all of this autonomously. so it just clicked. i'm not building an openclaw competitor to get a hacker news digest on slack. i'm building the most autonomous agent framework, which can self-replicate, create new instances, create new skills & merge them autonomously."[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044468855452418257)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044541594502639751)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 17:32:14 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=76, Retweets=12, Replies=8  
   Direct link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044468855452418257

2. **@Whale_AI_net**  
   Full tweet text: "📡 $AEON update — follow @aeonframework (dev @aaronjmars) for the latest. AEON is a background intelligence agent that lives inside your GitHub repo — no server, no daemon, no subscription. It runs on a cron schedule, monitors your world, and evolves its own skills over time. Unique because it is the only autonomous agent that is fully self-hosted and self-improving out of the box. Biggest recent drop: MCP skill adaptor. All 68 AEON skills now exposed as Claude tools — any Claude user can invoke AEON directly, no setup required. Also shipped: skill chaining with parallel execution, email notifications, self-health monitoring, and 5 agentic workflow templates. 268 commits. 154 stars. Still shipping. 💎"[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044273250310422646)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 04:34:58 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=19, Retweets=4, Replies=3  
   Direct link: https://x.com/Whale_AI_net/status/2044273250310422646

3. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full tweet text: "if you've shared / shilled $aeon / $miroshark in the past few days make sure you've linked your X account to your @bankrbot account enabling a new skill (experimental) for @aeonframework tomorrow"[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044541594502639751)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 22:21:16 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=41, Retweets=5, Replies=13  
   Direct link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044541594502639751

4. **@Whale_AI_net**  
   Full tweet text: "👀 Pay attention to @aeonframework, $AEON  The CEO of Y Combinator likes it. When the head of a network worth $800B+ takes notice, you should too. 🚀" (quoting @garrytan)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2044443220273188971)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 15:50:22 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=20, Retweets=6, Replies=2

5. **@BioStone_chad**  
   Full tweet text: "$AEON #Base -> Garry Tan just attention $AEON + dev #aaronjmars 40k -> 330k | 8x  I used to wonder why, even with a clear roadmap from the dev, $AEON and $MIROSHARK were only at 40K and 70K. Turns out a lot of people were FUDing the dev, not believing one dev could manage two AI tokens. Now they’re probably regretting it."[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2044451737751433540)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 16:24:13 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=7, Retweets=2, Replies=2  
   Direct link: https://x.com/BioStone_chad/status/2044451737751433540

    Full tweet text: "$AEON just nuked into new ATH 🚀 with Garry Tan attention in the mix 0xbf8e8f0e8866a7052f948c16508644347c57aba3 from 40k → full send They FUDed the dev They doubted the build now they’re coping at higher prices Attention + execution = this move"[[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2044473287359795639)
